title: Beware of Chicken 3: A Xianxia Cultivation Novel
author: Casualfarmer
description: Jin Rou wanted to be a cultivator. A man powerful enough to defy the heavens. A master of martial arts. A lord of spiritual power. Unfortunately for him, he died, and now I’m stuck in his body....

title: Beware of Chicken 2: A Xianxia Cultivation Novel
author: Casualfarmer
description: Well, this year, after the Spring Planting season, I’m really gonna relax and put down roots. It’s the slow life for me. Sure, the talking animals and cultivators coming to live with me are a bit weird, but this year everything is gonna be basically normal....

title: The Path of Ascension: Books 1-3.5
author: C. Mantis
description: Matt plans to delve the rifts responsible for the monsters that destroyed his city and murdered his parents. But his dreams are crushed when his Tier One Talent is rated as detrimental, and no guild or group will take him....

title: Path of the Berserker: A Daopocalypse Progression Fantasy
author: Rick Scott
description: When the cultivators came to Earth, they destroyed our entire civilization in a matter of hours. Armies fell, cities burned, and that was before the moon turned red and filled our world with monsters. Now, over a decade later, what's left of humanity slaves under the heels of Qi-infused masters....

title: The Aspects
author: Ivan Kal
description: Hastur is dead. But his armies and generals remain. While the factions struggle to recover from the chaos in the wake of Hastur's influence on the world, the Sects gather in hope of defeating the threat once and for all....

title: A Thousand Li: The Third Realm
author: Tao Wong
description: Heaven Commands, the Middle Kingdom Concedes. Or so the story goes. As Wu Ying travels beyond the kingdom of Shen chasing enlightenment, he experiences the truth of that statement. Disparate forms of government, new cultures, and people abound with new ways of cultivating towards immortality.

title: Rune Seeker
author: J.M. Clarke, C.J. Thompson
description: The Everfail will rise. His enemies will fall. Hiral is the Everfail, the weakest person on the flying island of Fallen Reach. He trains harder than any warrior. Studies longer than any scholar. But all his people are born with magic powered by the sun, flowing through tattoos on their bodies...

title: The First Law of Cultivation
author: KrazeKode
description: What happens when cultivation meets mad science? Lu Jie woke up in a world filled with scheming sects, arrogant young masters, and the mad chase for the immortal heavens. He wanted none of it, and soon finds himself beaten bloody in a spar he didn't remember and treated as less than worthless...

title: A Thousand Li: The Third Cut: A Xianxia Cultivation Novel
author: Tao Wong
description: As corruption seeps from the southern kingdom of Nanyue, Wu Ying sets out on a dangerous journey to uncover its source. Spirit stones have become corrupted, with twisted daos embedded within. If left unchecked, this corruption threatens to spread across the world....

title: Dungeon in the Clouds
author: Daniel Weber
description: When Kers is reborn as a dungeon core, he finds himself stuck in the most improbable of places: a cloud....
narrator: Justin Thomas James, Dorrie Sacks, Jeff Hays, Annie Ellicott

title: Speedrunning the Multiverse
author: adastra339
description: Already conquered the Multiverse, have you? Well, do it faster! Behold the Multiverse! Its countless realms overflow with terrific opportunities and terrible dangers—warring sects, priceless treasures, martial techniques, and all manner of horrible monsters abound. And Dorian has conquered...

title: Wish Upon the Stars 1
author: Malcolm Tent
description: The Wish Curse Palace, the largest criminal organization in the multiverse, seeks its new successor. On Shane's eighteenth birthday, his dormant Wishmaster bloodline awakens, making him a potential heir to the organization's legacy....

title: Becoming a God Made Easy: A Cultivation-Esque LitRPG
author: Arthur Wordsmith
description: A young man's death is only the beginning when he elects to pursue divinity in a realm where gods and monsters are all too real....

title: Road to Mastery
author: Valerios
description: Jack Rust was a disillusioned biologist with a PhD—almost. When an extraterrestrial AI calling itself the System invaded Earth and thrusts it into a world of aliens and violence, the least Jack hoped for was gaining access to magic....

title: Apocalypse Cultivator: The Complete Series
author: Jack Bryce
description: The world is changing, and it needs a new Alpha. It needs me. I was doing well enough before the Apocalypse, but fast cars and penthouses mean nothing when the world changes into a wasteland filled with parasite-infested mutants....

title: Goblin Girl Maid Service
author: Landon Scott, Marcus Sloss
description: My life definitely wasn’t going according to plan, but that all changed the moment I died unexpectedly. Now I’ve been reborn into the fantasy metropolis of Dragonmont City, where I get a second chance to flourish....

title: Champion's Trial
author: JJ Bookerson
description: When a God of War barged into his apartment, Jake had no idea what to expect... but it wasn't being forced into a never-ending war against evil invaders, or that the battle would strangely resemble the MMORPG games he loved....

title: Skythief
author: Matthew Wolf
description: Seekers control the elemental forces of the world and must climb the World Tree for ultimate power. Dren, a ragtag thief from a dystopian world, is dropped into a land teeming with gods, monsters, magical creatures, and more....

title: Dungeon Core Online
author: Jonathan Smidt, Portal Books
description: With Cyb3Ru5 defeated, James is ready to get back to some good old-fashioned dungeon shenanigans. The experience left him shaken–but luckily, he now has friends to lean on....

title: Awakening: A LitRPG Adventure
author: AbyssRaven
description: If waking up in a new world isn't bad enough, Hestia starts her new life as a small, newborn dragon in a hostile forest filled with vicious monsters. With status screens obscuring her vision, her first task is to escape two hungry kobolds wanting some grilled lizard for breakfast....

title: The System Apocalypse, Books 7-9
author: Tao Wong
description: The Galactic capital of Irvina is a place of deep politics and old, entrenched power structures. If there’s one thing John doesn’t do, it’s injustice and bureaucracy....

title: Fortress Assault
author: JJ Bookerson
description: Jake's monster girls just want to have fun, but success always brings new challenges. After his embarrassment in the Trials, an evil god wants vengeance, and he'll stop at nothing to get it....

title: Earth Siege: A LitRPG Dungeon Core Adventure
author: Dean Henegar
description: Hugh Logan and the other human cores of the expeditionary force are back home, but the cost of keeping their allies alive has been a heavy one. Not happy about losing their prey, the Ssath continue to use the vast resources at their disposal to seek total victory over humanity....

title: Silver Fox & The Western Hero: Warrior's Peril
author: M.H. Johnson
description: Alex had done it. Ascending farther than anyone had thought possible, earning a title as sacred as the right to rule within the Golden Realms. But there was no way his enemies would accept his ascension. Not after he had disrupted so many of their twisted plans....

title: Cultivator vs. System: The Complete Series
author: Valerios
description: Long Fang is stranded in a foreign world where proper cultivation has been replaced by annoying blue screens. He is confused and alone...but not for long....

title: Dungeon Engineer
author: Playwars aka Alex S. Weber
description: They thought sacrificing her would further their own goals. Instead, they changed an engineer into the single most powerful fabricator in existence, a dungeon core....

title: Core Retribution
author: Jonathan Brooks
description: Milton and his crew miraculously managed to destroy yet another Stabilizing Anchor in a different dimension, freeing the people there from the threat of the Heliothropes that sought to invade. Their success wasn’t just in the form of stopping the enemy, however, as they also gained a new ally....

title: Path Of Time Deviant Book 1
author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
description: Allen Ming awakens in an unfamiliar realm, trapped within an unfamiliar form—feeble in body and spirit. Thrust into a world of cultivation, Allen Ming finds himself grappling with a reality of a wastrel body, and a world filled with danger and killing....

title: Apocalypse Station Vol. 1: A LitRPG Adventure
author: Kaz Hunter
description: Asher's ordinary life is shattered when he is suddenly yanked from his daily commute and thrust into a brutal world of monstrous creatures, deadly traps, and the relentless games of the Nexus....

title: Elemental Summoner, Books 4-6
author: D. Levesque
description: In a world where monsters and humans struggle to coexist, Alex thought he had everything under control. With his loyal lovers Leeha and Bridget by his side, they navigated the turbulent waters of Boromour....

title: Inheritance
author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
description: Gifted with knowledge of the future, Li Wei’s path should be an easy one, right? But when the future doesn’t behave as it’s supposed to, plans are derailed and things change....

title: This Young Master's Mother Is Mighty
author: D.C. Haenlien
description: After Tianyi successfully solving the problem with his self-created cultivation method, a full 10 years had passed, and it was time to visit the Northern Region once more....

title: Core Domination
author: Jonathan Brooks
description: The Station Core and his allies managed to survive a disastrous meeting with Emperor Helios, and are coming back stronger than ever....

title: Elemental Summoner 6
author: D. Levesque
description: Alex is still on Orac, but now he has some friends who surprised him by just showing up out of the blue, and he has become friends with new characters....

title: Baptization
author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
description: Joining Divine Fragrance Palace has propelled Li Wei on the path of alchemy and the path of his Dao. However, one of the three prominent clans of the Divine Fragrance Palace is in marital relationship with Du clan that he had eliminated, and they don’t take a slap-in-the-face lightly....

title: The Wolf King's Lair 5
author: Devan Drake
description: There are others in the Proving Grounds, like the Silver Lady, Jezebel. She had her own plans, which don't align with Daxas'. Not to mention that the threat from without is undiminished. Timian, and others, are still gunning hard for Daxas. They want what he has....

title: Five Rings of Cultivation
author: Konstantin Zaitsev
description: Learn the nature of the Rings of Power in your soul, and the call of blood will lead you in the fights against even the most powerful of demons....

title: Final Core: Volume 1
author: D.M. Rhodes, Razzmatazz
description: I died and was accidentally reborn as an [angelic monstrosity]. So now I'm building a holy dungeon-tower that is tall enough to reach the gods...so that I can complain about it! But the humans think that I am trying to destroy the world....

title: Climbing the Ranks
author: Tao Wong
description: When the Towers arrived, without warning, without communication of intent or indication of reasoning, chaos ensued....

title: Cultivation Academy Omega
author: Austin Beck
description: Vincenzo Sabatino is the son of a notorious mafia boss, and although he has always tried to maintain a sense of honor and integrity, he has often been forced to do things that he isn't proud of in order to please his father and uphold the family's reputation....

title: Beast Origin Realm
author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
description: Li Wei’s battle with Wang Jiang has left him gravely injured and stranded in the Beast Origin Realm, a mysterious place that is as much a danger to him as it is a refuge. With Spirit Beasts clamoring for his blood and few allies he can count on, his only choice is to train, and train hard....

title: The Wolf King's Lair 6
author: Devan Drake
description: Jezebel and the elf guilds have been defeated. The elven goddess now resides in the Wolf King's lair, along with Daxas and the others. However, her attempts to destroy Daxas' dungeon and steal all the soul energy he had collected over time has not been without consequence.

title: Level Up Rebel
author: Zac Ostermann
description: The path ahead of him is arduous, the challenges many, and the chances of survival are slim. But he is determined to become the level up rebel, a warrior who will unite the survivors and destroy the system holding the world hostage....

title: Apocalypse Assassin
author: J.J. Thorn
description: Ten years ago, the world changed. The System brought dungeons and monsters to earth. Billions were lost. While most try to rebuild, Claire chooses to take revenge on the people who took advantage of orphans in the chaos—100 names, 100 targets....

title: Demon Core: A Dungeon-Core LitRPG
author: D. M. Rhodes, Razzmatazz
description: Shattered by tragedy, consumed with rage, a young man surrenders his soul for the power to destroy humanity in the first novel of this dark fantasy series....

title: This Clone Is the Protagonist's Master
author: D. C. Haenlien
description: There was once a man born with a noble pedigree and peerless talent. His name was Xi Tianyi, and he was a man destined for immortal ascension. This is not his story....

title: Highway Hero 2
author: Jack Bryce
description: Low on supplies, low on ammo, and recovering from our last fight, me and my ragtag band of survivors have plenty of challenges ahead. But survival isn’t the only thing I’m concerned with; I want revenge on the man who betrayed us....

title: Mana Storm: Origin
author: Erik Weir
description: In a world of superheroes, supervillains, mystical portals, and monsters from strange realms, I'd be considered perfectly ordinary, living a normal life in an extraordinary world. That is until fate intervened....

title: System Error
author: Aaron Shih
description: Parker Wu’s life was cut short after a tragic encounter with a very large truck. But when one existence ended, another far more bizarre one began. Reincarnated and transported to the Continent, Parker is no longer a corporeal being....

title: Wandering Cultivator of the Broken Empire, Book 1
series: Wandering Cultivator of the Broken Empire
author: Robyn Wideman, Scribes of Sulterra
description: Calin has a bright future as the top Alchemy student in the entire Academy, and the clans are lining up to woo him....

title: Soul Seeker: A LitRPG Cultivation Series
author: V.A. Lewis
description: Utana has been liberated...but all is not over. Galgom still lives. A single copy of his Hivemind survived. Once he is captured, there is peace...for a moment.....

title: Upgraded: The Infinity Construct, Book 2
author: Burkley Orion Smith
description: With the future of Infinity and the soul of humanity on the line, Ash will do everything he can to become strong enough to reach the key buried within the deepest bowels of hell. The only problem is, the more powerful he becomes, the more power he's starting to crave....

title: Lesser Souls: The Path of Celestial Thunder
author: D. R. R. Hatch
description: No matter how long she meditates, breathing in the vital aura of the world, her soul refuses to cultivate. Her betters say the Heavens forbid it, but Jasmine isn’t so sure....

title: Immortal Journeys
author: Kenneth Arant, Eden Hudson, Gage Lee
description: Whether you're an avid cultivation fan or just want to boost your fantasy collection, Immortal Journeys from Shadow Alley Press brings battle artists and progression together in an exciting set you'll pick up again and again....
narrator: Travis Baldree, Pavi Proczko, TL Barnett, Joedan Worley

title: Cruel Empire
author: Robyn Wideman, JK Daniels
description: In the Empire, cultivation is restricted. Weapons are forbidden. Tyranny reigns. When disaster strikes for Oren and his family, there is only one choice: flee the local magistrate and his arrogant son who wants to destroy their family....
